info.title: Keyflare API
info.description: Open-source secrets manager built entirely on Cloudflare. One Worker. One D1 database. Zero trust storage.

post.description: Create the first user API key. Only works when no keys exist in the database.

201.description: Bootstrap successful - First user key created

409.description: Bootstrap already completed - API keys already exist

get.description: List all API keys with their metadata

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request body or parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing, invalid, or revoked API key

post.description: Create a new API key (user or system type). System keys require scopes and permission.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request body or parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing, invalid, or revoked API key

403.description: Forbidden - Key doesn't have required scope/permission

delete.description: Revoke an API key by its prefix

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request body or parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing, invalid, or revoked API key

403.description: Forbidden - Key doesn't have required scope/permission

put.description: Update a system key's scopes and permission. Replaces all existing scopes.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request body or parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing, invalid, or revoked API key

403.description: Forbidden - Key doesn't have required scope/permission

get.description: List all projects. System keys only see projects within their scope.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request body or parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing, invalid, or revoked API key

post.description: Create a new project. Creates dev and prod environments by default unless environmentless is true. Project and environment names are case-insensitive.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request body or parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing, invalid, or revoked API key

403.description: Forbidden - Key doesn't have required scope/permission

delete.description: Delete a project and all its environments and secrets

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request body or parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing, invalid, or revoked API key

403.description: Forbidden - Key doesn't have required scope/permission

get.description: List all environments in a project. System keys only see environments within their scope.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request body or parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing, invalid, or revoked API key

post.description: Create a new environment within a project

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request body or parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing, invalid, or revoked API key

403.description: Forbidden - Key doesn't have required scope/permission

delete.description: Delete an environment and all its secrets

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request body or parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing, invalid, or revoked API key

403.description: Forbidden - Key doesn't have required scope/permission

get.description: Get all secrets for an environment. Returns decrypted key-value pairs.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request body or parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing, invalid, or revoked API key

403.description: Forbidden - Key doesn't have required scope/permission

put.description: Set all secrets for an environment (full override). Deletes all existing secrets first!

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request body or parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing, invalid, or revoked API key

403.description: Forbidden - Key doesn't have required scope/permission

patch.description: Partially update secrets - set new/updated keys and/or delete specific keys

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request body or parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing, invalid, or revoked API key

403.description: Forbidden - Key doesn't have required scope/permission
